title: BEM-840 remove bad JSON
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
invalid_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid')
archived=[]
valid=[]
for p in sorted(queue.glob('*.json')):
    txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    try:
        json.loads(txt)
        valid.append(str(p))
    except Exception as exc:
        target=invalid_dir/(p.name+'.bad.txt')
        target.write_text(txt+sep+'--- parse_error ---'+sep+str(exc)+sep)
        p.unlink()
        archived.append({'path':str(p),'archived_as':str(target),'error':str(exc)})
# Ensure one clean valid Claude retry item remains if queue became empty.
remaining=[str(p) for p in sorted(queue.glob('*.json'))]
created_file=None
if not remaining:
    fresh=queue/'bem840_claude_dispatch_valid_retry.json'
    fresh.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 clean valid retry after invalid queue JSON removal','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_file=str(fresh)
    remaining.append(str(fresh))
status='invalid_dispatch_json_removed' if archived else 'no_invalid_dispatch_json_found'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'archived_count':len(archived),'archived':archived,'valid_before':valid,'remaining_queue':remaining,'created_file':created_file,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_remove_invalid_dispatch_json.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_remove_invalid_dispatch_json.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Remove Invalid Dispatch JSON | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results, Claude runtime state, and real Claude response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: fresh tick and verify proof triad.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_remove_invalid_dispatch_json.json','governance/reports/bem840_remove_invalid_dispatch_json.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
for item in archived: changed.append(item['archived_as'])
if created_file: changed.append(created_file)
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Scanned workflow_dispatch_queue, archived malformed JSON files, removed blockers, and ensured a clean valid Claude dispatch retry item exists')
"""
No issue comments.
